case_title: MERIDIAN EQUITY PARTNERS, INC. VS. JOSEPH W. NILES

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN EQUITY PARTNERS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NILES, JOSEPH W. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN EQUITY PARTNERS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NILES, JOSEPH W. $578,062.92 PRINCIPAL, $14,681.62 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $593,194.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH W. NILES ON DEC-12-2017 CONTINUED TO JAN-11-2018 AT 2:00PM IN DEPT. 514 PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY FOR FURTHER EXAMINATION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. DENIS KLAVDIANOS, ESQ., APPEARING FOR JUDGMENT CREDITOR MERIDIAN EQUITY PARTNERS, INC. JUDGMENT DEBTOR JOSEPH W. NILES APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF, SWORN AND EXAMINED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON, CLERK: A. MOK. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ANGELA POURTABIB, CSR #13714. (514)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION JAN-11-2018 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH W. NILES. NO APPEARANCE.
